mapper.select: select userId as friendId, username as friendName from user where userId in (select friendId from friend where userId = #{userId})

select userId as friendId, username as friendName from user where userId != #{selfUserId} and username like concat('%', #{friendName}, '%') and userId not in (select friendId from friend where userId = #{selfUserId}) and userId not in (select fromUserId from add_friend_request where toUserId = #{selfUserId} and status = 'pending')
mapper.insert: insert into add_friend_request (fromUserId, toUserId, reason, status) values (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{reason}, 'pending')
mapper.select: select * from add_friend_request where fromUserId = #{fromUserId} and toUserId = #{toUserId} and status = 'pending'
select r.*, u.username as fromUserName from add_friend_request r, user u where r.toUserId = #{toUserId} and r.status = 'pending' and r.fromUserId = u.userId
mapper.update: update add_friend_request set status = 'accepted' where fromUserId = #{fromUserId} and toUserId = #{toUserId}
update add_friend_request set status = 'rejected' where fromUserId = #{fromUserId} and toUserId = #{toUserId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from friend where userId = #{userId} and friendId = #{friendId}
